dashboard.label: Threat Hunting Workbench
dashboard.description: Practitioner threat-hunting panel with per-technique SPL templates, hunt steps, and rogue-actor narratives from the lab playbooks.

search.query: | inputlookup acme_technique_playbooks_lookup | search technique_id="$technique_id$*" OR "$technique_id$"="*" | table technique_id, technique_name, execution_mode, severity, threat_hunt_spl, threat_hunt_steps, rogue_actor_story, risk_statement | sort technique_id

`acme_genai_index` $time_range$ | search technique_id="$technique_id$*" OR "$technique_id$"="*" | search incident_id="$incident_id$*" OR "$incident_id$"="*" | search agent.id="$agent_id$*" OR "$agent_id$"="*" | table _time, incident_id, technique_id, framework.technique_name, agent.id, execution_mode, testbed_mode, defenseclaw_blocked, codeguard_blocked, rogue_actor_story, risk_statement | sort - _time
`acme_genai_index` $time_range$ | eval blocked=if(defenseclaw_blocked="true" OR codeguard_blocked="true", "BLOCKED", "ALLOWED") | stats count by technique_id, blocked | sort - count
